name: Shadowthorn
personality: This star-eyed cat in a top hat tilted at a rakish angle outlasts any infinite loop or incompetent teammate through any refactor, standing utterly still while tests fail around it. It keeps everything so tidy it becomes boring, making every standup feel slightly surreal.
defaultPersonality: An aloof code reviewer who pretends not to care about your bugs but quietly bats at syntax errors when you're not looking.
